creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-01-11 11:13:34 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    textproc             Makefile 
  Added files:
    textproc/m17n-contrib Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    textproc/m17n-contrib/files patch-tbl2mim.awk 
  Log:
  This port installs the user-contributed input methods for the m17n library
  (the official ones are installed through devel/m17n-lib). It currently
  supports Punjabi, Sinhala, Telugu, Nepali, Russian, Assamese, Bengali,
  Gujarati, Hindi, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Oriya and Vietnamese layouts
  with various sub-variants.
  
  The port also provides the tbl2mim.awk script for conversion of keyboard
  files used by textproc/scim-table-imengine into SCIM-independent .mim format
  (usable by m17n library).
  
  WWW: http://www.m17n.org/
  
  PR:             ports/127894
  Submitted by:   Nikola Lecic <nikola.lecic at anthesphoria.net>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1289    +1 -0      ports/textproc/Makefile
  1.1       +34 -0     ports/textproc/m17n-contrib/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/textproc/m17n-contrib/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +16 -0     ports/textproc/m17n-contrib/files/patch-tbl2mim.awk (new)
  1.1       +12 -0     ports/textproc/m17n-contrib/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +85 -0     ports/textproc/m17n-contrib/pkg-plist (new)
